item.title: DFS Project
item.description:
Organization: Collaborative Forecasting Program
Period: 2025-Present

Applied atmospheric forecasting collaboration for model development and performance improvement.

Replace this content with your finalized project summary, responsibilities, outcomes, and links.

item.title: EU-SCORES (TU Delft)
item.description:
Organization: TU Delft
Period: 2022-2024

Integrated offshore renewable systems research with atmospheric and wind-resource modeling contributions.

Replace this content with your finalized project summary, responsibilities, outcomes, and links.

item.title: WISER Project
item.description:
Organization: University at Albany
Period: 2024-2025

Early-stage collaboration on weather-intelligence and resilience-oriented modeling workflows.

item.title: TabNet for High-Resolution Wind Profiles
item.description:
Estimating high-resolution vertical wind speed profiles from global reanalysis data using TabNet and transfer-learning concepts.

Read the paper

item.title: Wind Gust Field Generation from Sparse Observations
item.description:
Deep-learning framework for generating high-resolution wind gust fields from sparse Mesonet observations, designed for operationally relevant nowcasting.

Read the preprint

item.title: WRF Calibration with ML for Tropical Cyclones
item.description:
Machine-learning-based sensitivity analysis and calibration of WRF physics for improved cyclone prediction in the Bay of Bengal.

Read the paper
